FlashProfileDemo Test Fixtures
================================

Downloaded from: https://github.com/SaswatPadhi/FlashProfileDemo
Date: 2025-12-12

File Summary:
-------------

SIMPLE HOMOGENEOUS (Basic Validation):
1. phones.json (2.0K, 106 lines)
   - Phone number formats
   - Source: Dealer locator database

2. bool.json (1.0K, 82 lines)
   - Boolean/word validation
   - Source: PLOS ONE journal supplementary data

3. dates.json (4.8K, 264 lines)
   - Date format examples
   - Source: Stockport purchasing card spend data

HOMOGENEOUS (Scale Test):
4. ipv4.json (109K, 5414 lines)
   - IPv4 address patterns
   - Source: Namebench server configuration

5. emails.json (2.7K, 94 lines)
   - Email address formats
   - Source: NewCircle attendees CSV

HETEROGENEOUS (Clustering Validation):
6. hetero_dates.json (880B, 35 lines)
   - Mixed date formats
   - Source: Stack Overflow date normalization question

7. us_canada_zip_codes.json (1.7K, 117 lines)
   - US and Canadian postal codes
   - Source: Dealer locator database

MOTIVATING EXAMPLE:
8. motivating_example.json (32K, 1508 lines)
   - Publication identifiers (PMC, ISBN, DOI)
   - Note: Contains trailing comma (present in original)

Total: 8 files, 7620 lines
